name: Puzzle - STONE BLOCKS
short_description: Games for meditation and relaxation. Have 180 levels.
detailed_description:
This is interesting logical game for meditation. The game has 180 levels in 5 territories.
The task of the game is to fill the empty space with stones located around the playing field.
To move the figure use the LEFT mouse button, and to rotate the figure use the RIGHT mouse.

Other games:
